moments.title: World Cup Final Nears
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is reaching its climax with the final set for Sunday, July 19th, in New York, USA.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just days away! Who are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy on Sunday?

angles.name: Tournament Highlights
angles.copy: What's been your moment of the FIFA World Cup 2026 so far? So many incredible goals and upsets!

moments.title: Golf's Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship tees off this Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale, with the world's best golfers competing for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Birkdale Buzz
angles.copy: The Open Championship is heading to Royal Birkdale this week! Who's excited for world-class golf right on our doorstep?

angles.name: Claret Jug Chase
angles.copy: Golf's most historic prize is up for grabs. Which player are you tipping to conquer Royal Birkdale and win The Open this year?

moments.title: Wimbledon Crowns Champions
moments.blurb: Wimbledon 2026 concluded yesterday, July 12th, after two weeks of thrilling tennis, crowning new champions in the men's and women's singles.

angles.name: Wimbledon Review
angles.copy: What a fortnight of tennis! Wimbledon 2026 wrapped up yesterday. What was your favourite moment from this year's championships?

angles.name: New Champions
angles.copy: Hats off to the new Wimbledon champions! Who impressed you most on Centre Court this year?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Takes Over London
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival brings huge names to Finsbury Park, London, this weekend, running from July 12th to 14th with headliners like Travis Scott and 21 Savage.

angles.name: Wireless Live
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is happening right now in Finsbury Park! Who's there today catching the biggest names in hip-hop and grime?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: What an incredible lineup at Wireless this weekend! If you could only see one artist, who would it be?

moments.title: TRNSMT Rocks Glasgow Green
moments.blurb: Scotland's TRNSMT Festival wrapped up yesterday, July 12th, at Glasgow Green after a weekend of massive performances from rock and pop acts.

angles.name: TRNSMT Highlights
angles.copy: TRNSMT 2026 was epic! What was your favourite set or moment from Glasgow Green this weekend?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Season
angles.copy: Another brilliant TRNSMT done and dusted! Who's already buzzing for next year's festival season in Scotland?

moments.title: Chart Battle Heats Up
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart was unveiled last Friday, with anticipation building for this week's update on July 17th.

angles.name: Number One Prediction
angles.copy: Who do you think will claim the Official UK Number 1 spot this Friday? Any new tracks you're hoping to see climb the chart?

angles.name: Latest Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Catching up with last week's Official UK Singles Chart! Any surprises or did your favourite take the top spot?

moments.title: Love Island Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is heating up on ITV2, with new bombshells and challenges keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Did you watch Love Island last night? We need to talk about that bombshell! What's your take on the latest drama?

angles.name: Favourite Couple
angles.copy: Who are you rooting for in the Love Island villa? Is your favourite couple still going strong?

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for hits like 'You're No Good' and 'Blue Bayou,' celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Ronstadt at 80
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt! What's your favourite track from her iconic career?

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring voice of Linda Ronstadt as she turns 80 this week. Pure talent!

moments.title: Luke Bryan Turns 50
moments.blurb: Country superstar and American Idol judge Luke Bryan, celebrated for tracks like 'Country Girl (Shake It for Me),' turns 50 on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Fifty & Fabulous
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to Luke Bryan on Thursday! Send us your favourite Luke Bryan song to celebrate this country icon!

angles.name: Country King
angles.copy: Celebrating Luke Bryan's big 5-0 this week! What's the ultimate Luke Bryan anthem for you?

moments.title: Brian May's 79th
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Brian May's birthday this Saturday! The Red Special and those iconic riffs still sound as fresh as ever.

moments.title: Carlos Santana Hits 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, whose fusion of rock and Latin American jazz has produced timeless hits, turns 79 on Sunday, July 20th.

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the master, Carlos Santana, this Sunday! Which of his iconic guitar tracks gets you moving?

angles.name: Timeless Guitar
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana as he turns 79. His music transcends generations!

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer/vocalist Don Henley, known for his distinctive voice on hits like 'Hotel California' and 'The Boys of Summer,' celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Don Henley on Tuesday! What's your all-time favourite Eagles or solo track?

angles.name: Voice of a Decade
angles.copy: Celebrating the legendary Don Henley's birthday this week. That voice is simply unmistakable!

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar, actress, and businesswoman Selena Gomez, known for hits like 'Come & Get It' and 'Lose You to Love Me,' celebrates her 34th birthday on Tuesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 34th birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez on Tuesday! What's your favourite Selena track to blast out?

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: From Disney star to global sensation, celebrating Selena Gomez's birthday this week! Her journey is incredible.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Are Here!
moments.blurb: With schools breaking up across the UK, the long-awaited summer holidays are officially underway for many families.

angles.name: Holiday Mode On
angles.copy: It's official: the summer holidays have begun for many! What are your plans for the next few weeks? Staycation or jetting off?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: School's out in Wales! Wishing all our listeners a fantastic start to the summer holidays. What local adventures are you planning?
